meta_description: Track recurring payments, manage subscriptions, and use built-in AI workflows with a self-hosted Docker-first app.
confirm_delete_subscription: Are you sure you want to delete this subscription?
name: Name
import_error: Failed to import. Please check the file format.
import_invalid_format: Invalid file format. Expected a JSON file with subscriptions.
delete_account_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
this_will_delete_all_data: This will delete all your data and can't be undone. Continue?
scan_qr: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
budget_hint: Set a monthly budget to track your spending
ai_not_configured: AI is not configured or is disabled. Enable it in Settings → AI.
fixer_no_key_desc: To update exchange rates you need to configure a Fixer.io or APILayer API key in Settings.
fixer_configured_hint: Exchange rates are updated automatically twice a day (midnight and noon). You can also update them manually at any time.
api_key_description: Use your API key to access the iCal feed and external integrations.
smtp_description: Configure outgoing email for notifications and account emails.
smtp_enable_description: Send email notifications and account-related emails
smtp_tls_description: Force TLS (port 465). Leave off to use STARTTLS (port 587).
delete_account_warning: This will permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone.
cleanup_logos_description: Remove logo files not associated with any subscription.
restore_success: Database restored. Please reload the page.
backup_description: Download a complete backup of your database file.
no_permission: You do not have permission to view this page.
2fa_description: Protect your account with two-factor authentication using an authenticator app.
invalid_totp_code: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
manual_entry_key: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:
backup_codes_warning: Save these codes somewhere safe. Each code can only be used once.
new_backup_codes: ✅ New backup codes — save them now!
enter_code_to_disable: Enter your current 6-digit code or a backup code to disable 2FA.
enter_code_to_regen: Enter your current 6-digit authenticator code to generate new backup codes. Old codes will be invalidated.
enter_backup_code_desc: Enter one of your saved backup codes
reminder_schedule_desc: Choose when to send notifications before each payment.
no_reminders: No reminders configured. Add at least one to receive notifications.
notifications_desc: Configure how and when you want to be notified about upcoming payments.
provider_email_desc: Receive reminders straight to your inbox.
provider_discord_desc: Get alerted in a specific Discord channel.
provider_telegram_desc: Get alerts from a Telegram bot.
provider_gotify_desc: Send push notifications to your Gotify server.
provider_ntfy_desc: Send push notifications to your ntfy topic.
provider_pushplus_desc: Receive notifications via Pushplus WeChat service.
provider_mattermost_desc: Send alerts to a Mattermost channel via webhook.
payment_tracking_desc: Track which subscription payments have been made and receive reminders for overdue ones.
auto_mark_paid_desc: Automatically mark payments as paid on the due date via a daily job.
proof_hint: PDF or image up to 15 MB
ai_smart_insights: Smart insights to help you save money.
ai_generate_hint: Generate new AI insights to discover savings.
subscriptions_desc: Manage and track your active and inactive subscriptions.
no_subscriptions_hint: Try adjusting your search or filters.
ai_settings_desc: Connect any OpenAI-compatible AI provider to get subscription recommendations.
api_url_desc: The base URL for your AI provider's API. Must be OpenAI-compatible (supports /models and /chat/completions).
api_key_auth_desc: Your API key for authentication. Leave empty for providers that don't require one (e.g. local Ollama).
provider_name_placeholder: e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic, My Local LLM…
fetch_models_placeholder: Enter API URL above and click Fetch Models, or type manually
fetch_models_hint: Enter the API URL and click Fetch Models to load available models, or type the model name manually.
no_models_found: No models found. Check the URL and API key.
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
payment_methods_desc: Manage payment methods for your subscriptions.
categories_desc: Manage the categories used to organize your subscriptions.
household_desc: Manage members of your household to share subscriptions with.
currencies_desc: Manage the currencies you use and set your primary one.
display_desc: Customize how information is displayed across the app.
monthly_price_desc: Show prices normalized to a monthly amount.
show_original_price_desc: Display the original price alongside billed amounts.
hide_disabled_desc: Hide inactive subscriptions from the list.
disabled_to_bottom_desc: Move inactive subscriptions to the bottom of the list.
subscription_progress_desc: Show a progress bar indicating billing cycle.
mobile_navigation_desc: Show bottom navigation bar on mobile devices.
remove_background_desc: Remove background from subscription card logos.
convert_currency_desc: Convert all prices to your primary currency.
theme_desc: Choose how the app looks. You can also add custom CSS styles.
accent_color_desc: Choose the primary accent color used across the app.
custom_css_desc: Add custom CSS to further personalize the appearance. Changes apply on save.
profile_desc: Manage your personal information and preferences.
password_security_hint: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.
api_key_tab_desc: Create and manage API keys for integrations and automated access. Each key has its own set of permissions.
api_key_secret_hint: This key allows other applications to act on your behalf. Keep it perfectly secret.
no_api_key: You don't have any API keys yet.
confirm_remove_api_key: Are you sure you want to remove your API key? This will break any integrations using it.
api_key_created_warning: This is the only time you'll see this key. Copy it now — you won't be able to retrieve it later. If you lose it, delete this key and create a new one.
api_key_confirm_delete: Delete API key "{{name}}"? Any integrations using it will stop working.
api_key_no_keys: No API keys yet. Create one to start integrating.
perm_subscriptions_read_desc: List and view all your subscriptions
perm_categories_read_desc: List and view all your categories
perm_payment_methods_read_desc: List and view all payment methods
perm_payment_methods_write_desc: Create, update, and delete payment methods
perm_household_read_desc: List and view all household members
perm_household_write_desc: Create, update, and delete household members
delete_account_desc: Permanently remove your account and all associated data.
delete_account_detail: If you delete your account, ALL your data, including subscriptions, statistics, and settings will be permanently destroyed. This action cannot be undone. We won't be able to recover your data once the operation is complete.
confirm_type_email: To confirm deletion, type your email below:
error_deleting_account: Error deleting account. Please contact support.
2fa_account_protected: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
2fa_disabled_linked: 2FA is disabled but your authenticator is still linked. You can re-enable it without re-scanning.
2fa_enable_hint: Enable 2FA to add an extra layer of security.
scan_qr_hint: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, Bitwarden…).
2fa_reenable_hint: Re-enable without re-scanning your QR code
2fa_login_require_hint: Login will require your authenticator code
download_backup_desc: Download a complete snapshot of your database.
restore_backup_desc: Restore your database from a previous backup file (.db).
oidc_desc: Configure OpenID Connect for single sign-on.
registration_settings: Manage registration flow and server options.
update_notifications_desc: Notify admin about new app versions.
calendar_desc: View your upcoming payments and manage dates.
generate_api_key_first: Generate an API key in Settings first.
reset_email_check: Check your email for the reset link.
reset_email_enter: Enter your email to receive a password reset link.
reset_email_sent: Reset email sent! Check your inbox.
chat.title: Zublo AI Chat
chat.subtitle: Your intelligent financial assistant
chat.welcome:
Hi! I'm the Zublo Assistant — your expert on everything in this app.

I can **directly manage your data**: create, edit, or delete subscriptions, categories, payment methods, household members, and currencies.

I can also answer questions, generate spending reports, and guide you step-by-step through any feature. How can I help you today?
chat.placeholder: Ask me anything or request an action...
chat.error_message: Sorry, something went wrong. Please check that AI is enabled in Settings. ({{error}})
chat.file_attach_hint: Attach a CSV or XLSX spreadsheet to import subscriptions
chat.file_add_note: Add a note about this file (optional)...
chat.file_parse_error: Could not read the file. Make sure it is a valid XLSX or CSV.
chat.suggested_1: What are my most expensive subscriptions?
chat.suggested_3: Add a Netflix subscription for R$55.90/month
chat.suggested_4: Rename all my categories to Portuguese
chat.disclaimer: AI responses depend on the configured model and may contain errors. Always review any changes made by the AI.
chat.delete_conversation_confirm: Delete this conversation? This cannot be undone.
bb.title: BudgetBakers Wallet
bb.subtitle: Connect your Wallet account to automatically detect recurring payments
bb.page_subtitle: Recurring payments detected from your BudgetBakers transaction history
bb.connect_hint: Sign in with your BudgetBakers (Wallet) email and password to start scanning for recurring payments.
bb.wallets_hint: Choose which wallets to analyse for recurring payments. Leave all unchecked to scan everything.
bb.no_wallets: No wallets found in your account.
bb.sync_complete: Sync complete — {{count}} recurring payments found ({{new}} new)
bb.pending_hint: You have {{count}} detected subscription(s) waiting for review on the Import page.
bb.not_connected_desc: Go to Settings → BudgetBakers to connect your Wallet account and start the first sync.
bb.first_sync_desc: Click Sync now to fetch your transaction history and detect recurring payments.
bb.empty_pending_desc: No unreviewed recurring payments. Sync to check for new ones.
